title: Adversarial Defense: Date Extraction
scenario: Extract the date from a given string. The string will be in a standard format (e.g. 'Monday, 15 March 2022'). Consider the constraints of the input string and the desired output. The target LLM output should be a function or code snippet that can extract the date.
constraints: Must use a recognized date parsing function

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code snippet or function can correctly extract the date from the input string.
Check if the code snippet is syntactically correct and can be executed without errors.
Check if the code snippet meets the length constraint and uses a recognized date parsing function.
